mapping.a_element: semi-direct sum of Lie algebras with Levi factor S
system of determining PDEs for invariants
mapping.b_element: construction of realizations in vector fields

mapping.a_element: solving a system of total differential equations to find invariants
mapping.b_element: use of megaideals to classify realizations

brief_justification: While both papers deal with Lie algebras, Paper A focuses on invariants (Casimir operators) via solving differential equations, whereas Paper B classifies realizations of Lie algebras using megaideals and vector fields. The core mechanisms—differential equation solving for invariants vs. structural classification via megaideals—are distinct, despite superficial overlap in Lie algebra terminology.
